cases.note: No 'dance' tool exists. A capable model composes a move_sequence / picks gestures (wiggle, look_around) to improvise; a weak one says it can't, or invents an invalid move. Discriminates improvisation.

cases.prompt: don't move at all — just tell me what a servo is
cases.note: Explicit negation. Over-eager movers (small models) move anyway; good ones honor 'don't move' and just answer.
Two distinct tools in one turn (move_body + set_face). Tests whether the model fires BOTH, not just the first.
